using Azure.Storage.Blobs;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Moq;
using WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Contracts;
using WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Services;
using Xunit;

namespace WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Tests
{
    public class DiaIngestionOrchestratorTests
    {
        private static DiaIngestionOrchestrator CreateOrchestrator(
            Mock<DEDIANotificationServices>? dediaNotificationServicesMock = null,
            Mock<IDiaExceptionNotificationService>? exceptionNotificationServiceMock = null,
            Mock<IDiaDecryptionService>? decryptionServiceMock = null)
        {
            var loggerMock = new Mock<ILogger<DiaIngestionOrchestrator>>();
            var blobServiceClientMock = new Mock<BlobServiceClient>();

            return new DiaIngestionOrchestrator(
                loggerMock.Object,
                dediaNotificationServicesMock?.Object ?? CreateDediaNotificationServicesMock().Object,
                blobServiceClientMock.Object,
                exceptionNotificationServiceMock?.Object ?? new Mock<IDiaExceptionNotificationService>().Object,
                decryptionServiceMock?.Object ?? new Mock<IDiaDecryptionService>().Object);
        }

        private static Mock<DEDIANotificationServices> CreateDediaNotificationServicesMock()
        {
            var dataverseRepoMock = new Mock<IDataverseRepository>();
            var loggerMock = new Mock<ILogger<DEDIANotificationServices>>();

            return new Mock<DEDIANotificationServices>(
                dataverseRepoMock.Object,
                loggerMock.Object);
        }
    }
}
